creator: freebsd-bugzilla@in-addr.com
text:
Created attachment 179396
Patch to net/librsync2

librsync2 is used by duplicity, and ever since the switch from librsync to librsync2, duplicity has been crashing inside librsync

This thread:

https://answers.launchpad.net/duplicity/+question/284756

pointed to this patch

https://github.com/librsync/librsync/pull/59

It has fixed the issue for me
